revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Kazakh SSR]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Kazakh SSR]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Illegitimate Barrister moved page [[Template:Country data Kazakh SSR]] to [[Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]] over redirect
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: Bot: fix double redirect to final target
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:en:Template:Country data Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic | shortname alias = Kazakh SSR | flag alias = Flag of the Kazakh SSR.svg | flag alias-1937 = Flag of Kazakh SSR (1937-1940).svg | flag alias-1940 = Flag of Kazakh SSR (1940-1953).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = Kazakh SSR | related1 = Kazakhstan | related2 = Soviet Union | var1 = 1937 | var2 = 1940 </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kazakh_SSR here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kazakh_SSR for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic | shortname alias = Kazakh SSR | flag alias = Flag of the Kazakh SSR.svg | flag alias-1937 = Flag of Kazakh SSR (1937-1940).svg | flag alias-1940 = Flag of Kazakh SSR (1940-1953).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = Kazakh SSR | related1 = Kazakhstan | related2 = Soviet Union | var1 = 1937 | var2 = 1940 </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
